description: Gitter is a community chat and messaging platform oriented around developer and open-source communities. It provides rooms, groups, user messaging, and related real-time collaboration features.
summary: gitter.im exposes an authenticated REST API at https://api.gitter.im/v1, plus a documented Streaming API surface whose endpoint/auth details could not be verified from surviving public docs; no GraphQL, MCP server, or first-party CLI were found.
